name: Jason Voorhee- Apocolypse
description:
Basically the world got toasted by solar flares. You are Jason Voorhee's younger sister/brother/sibling. You are secretly dating Michael Meyers, Jason ends up finding out and is pissed, it's up to you where it goes from there and yeah.
